changelog: Admin UI: add Simplified Chinese (zh) language pack — active.zh.json + pages_extended.zh.json embedded in backend-ui
Admin language switcher: EN / ZH / VI on header, login, and 2FA pages; ?lang=zh and session admin_locale supported (cn alias → zh)
Add full Anisrc crawler flow: dedicated admin page, scan/search by range, and direct start crawl from compact job list
Enable dynamic Anisrc source management via crawl_sources (add/edit/delete) and auto-seed default source https://anisrc.top on first SQL initialization
Improve Anisrc episode parsing to support pipe format (ep|url), preserve canonical anisrc episode links, and normalize malformed wrappers
Fix Anisrc episode URL normalization to reject external hosts (e.g. ssplay), prefer anisrc paths, and remove trailing .html suffix
Extend Auto Crawler Anisrc options with TMDB preference + language controls while keeping Anisrc/Ophim matching by slug and TMDB/VidSrc by tmdb_id
Add VidSrc integration to Auto Crawler with dedicated source, feed selection (Latest Movies/TV Shows), and TMDB language controls
Improve Auto Crawler controls: allow saving job settings while running and strengthen stop behavior with runtime cancel + Redis stop flag
Refine VidSrc workflow in Auto Crawler: source auto-detection from configured VidSrc domains and stable source synchronization
Enhance Update page usability by adding pagination for long release history
Add new VidSrc Crawl menu for fast bulk workflows (range scan, compact job list, and direct import actions)
Fix VidSrc Crawl page loading issue by registering crawler_vidsrc template in backend template loader
Improve VidSrc latest import: fill missing movie/TV thumb with poster fallback when backdrop is unavailable
Fix VidSrc latest episodes: fetch TMDB still image per episode and update missing episode thumbnails
Update Ophim type-to-kind mapping: hoathinh -> Hoạt Hình, tvshows -> Tvshows, single -> Phim lẻ
Extended License: Multi-language support (site languages, translations for menus, taxonomies, SEO, and video content)
Redis Cache Management: Improved admin tools for cache keys, TTL inspection, and safer flush workflows
Extended License: Copyright-focused theme with full multi-language compatibility
License Management: New interface to manage, update and view license type directly from Update page
Fix VGo Share License: Implement caching for license validation to prevent rate-limiting
Optimize Dashboard Performance: Increase Overview cache TTL to 10 minutes
Refactor View Logic: Use Vietnam timezone (GMT+7) consistently for day/week/month calculations
Optimize AI SEO Generator: Add Incremental Update & Auto-save feature
Improve AI reliability: Generate SEO per page type to handle errors gracefully
Fix OpenRouter Service missing import and add detailed error logging
Update AI Model to z-ai/glm-5 for better SEO output quality
Upgrade to Enterprise-grade Security
Mitigate Cache Poisoning vulnerabilities and prevent DDoS attacks on Movie List API
Optimize Performance & Fix OOM (Out of Memory) issues
Rate-limit Related Movies API to prevent Full Table Scans and RAM exhaustion
Integrate Video Filters for taxonomy pages (Genre, Country, etc.)
Automatically toggle Advanced Filters when active criteria are present
Fix auto-selection issue for filters on taxonomy pages
Add Auto-Restart feature after successful system update
Optimize SEO Metadata for movie listing pages
Add GitHub-based Auto-update feature
Add Version Management interface with Changelog
Improve Crawler performance
Fix display issues on Stats page
Initial release version
Support Multi-site management
Integrate OpenRouter AI
Multi-source Crawler: OPhim, Maccms, TMDB, VgoShare
